op.note: Session 2025-08-02: Dana snapped at Sam over a dinner question during high work stress week (production incident, exec pressure post-launch); apologized next morning; Sam responded 'you're carrying a lot, but I'm not the incident'; Dana described it as 'one bad night' and emphasized 'six years and we don't do the snipe-at-each-other thing'; relationship repair was immediate and complete; Dana's concern is about work stress affecting her behavior, not relationship health

op.text: [as of 2025-08-02] Interoperability platform launch in early July 2025 has led to ongoing production incident and high-pressure executive management; Dana described work as 'a pressure cooker since the launch' with an exec treating her as 'single point of contact at all hours'; experiencing stress affecting mood at home
